discrepancies: PR #16 merged; corrections packet present on implementation head 2796b4a; no existing correction branch.

outcome.summary: Resolved CF-1..CF-6 and related nonblocking weaknesses: CI now runs the substantive validator and a git-aware ownership check on the main and stacked PRs; one governed status vocabulary enforced by schema+validator; provenance distinguishes intended reviewer from completed review; commit fields are point-in-time with the live branch head as authority; GOV-005 handoff files brought into declared ownership.

acceptance_criteria.name: AC1 CI runs substantive validator and fails on real violation
AC7 Schema and validator reject out-of-vocabulary status
AC9 Provenance distinguishes intended from completed review
AC10 Existing Claude findings preserved unchanged

changes.purpose: CF-1: run validator + ownership check + extended required files on main and stacked PRs.
changes.ownership_expansion_reason: Authorized by the correction packet (governance CI workflow).

changes.purpose: CF-3/CF-4/CF-6: enforce status vocabulary, schema-enum consistency, and provenance semantics.
CF-4/CF-6/CF-2: task_status enum, provenance shape, final_commit semantics.
CF-2/CF-3/CF-5: status authority, sync authority, ownership; correction task entry.
CF-1/CF-2/CF-3/CF-6: status authority, commit semantics, provenance, CI enforcement.
CF-6/CF-2: provenance and commit-field semantics in the template.
CF-3/CF-6: governed status and corrected provenance.
CF-3/CF-6/CF-2: aligned status, provenance, commit semantics.

downloads.purpose: Parse governance YAML in the validator and ownership check.

validation.name: Governance validator (positive)
validation.evidence: 4 active tasks; schema enum matches vocabulary

validation.name: Negative N3 review COMPLETED without reviewer
GitHub CI governance workflow
validation.evidence: runs after push; result recorded on the PR

deviations: Added a narrowly scoped, pinned governance dependency (PyYAML 6.0.2) per the correction packet; installed in an isolated venv, not committed.
No correction modified the immutable GOV-005 task packet or the merged Claude review evidence (preserved).

impacts.architecture: Governance/CI contract only; no product or runtime change.
impacts.security: Enforcement now actually runs in CI; ownership and provenance are machine-checked; main branch protection unchanged.
impacts.integration: Correction PR stacks on the GOV-005 implementation branch; ARCH-001 resynchronizes after GOV-005.
impacts.residual_risk: Ownership check uses union-of-ownership plus a governance allowlist; stricter per-branch ownership is a possible future hardening.

decisions_required: Schedule Antigravity independent validation of the corrections.
ChatGPT review and Product Owner merge decision.
Carry-over review questions Q1 (namespace exception) and final merge remain open.
recommended_next_action: Antigravity independently validates the corrections from a separate context; ChatGPT reviews and the Product Owner decides the merge. Do not merge until independent validation and Product Owner approval.
